name: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
original_name: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
overview: Twins Dak and Leyla lead a team of five dragons on adventures to protect the dragons and humans around their adopted home of Huttsgalor. Rescued from a shipwreck at a very early age by a mother dragon who raised them alongside her own son, Winger, the twins' goal is to pay forward their mother's kindness by helping those in need.
